scripts.db:migrate:contacts: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/002_contacts_mock_fields.sql
scripts.db:migrate:mock: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/003_mock_reference_data.sql
scripts.db:migrate:areas: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/004_area_boundary_metadata.sql
scripts.db:migrate:call-logs: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/005_drop_incident_duration.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker compose cp services/emergency-api/db/seeds/dev_seed.sql db:/tmp/dev_seed.sql && docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /tmp/dev_seed.sql
